tags.description: 2 hike-in tent sites with view of Merganser Pond for reservation. Table & food locker at each site. Portable restroom nearby. No potable water. No trash service. Pack out all trash. Camp stoves allowed. No campfires. No smoking.
tags.name: Merganser Campground

tags.description:
47 family camping spaces.
2 wheelchair-accessible campsites (6, 7) with an accessible restroom & showers.
RVs up to 31 feet and trailers up to 28 feet. No dump station or hook-ups.
